Localization.Description: Files from a security-critical virtual machine are copied

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} copied file {object.name} from security-critical virtual machine "{datafield5}" added manually
The user {subject.account.name} copied file {object.name} from security-critical virtual machine "{datafield5}" found during a scan
The user {subject.account.name} failed to copy file {object.name} from security-critical virtual machine "{datafield5}" added manually
The user {subject.account.name} failed to copy file {object.name} from security-critical virtual machine "{datafield5}" found during a scan
